title: Entifier
description: Configure Entity/Player sizes, jump height, health & more!
body:
### Entifier is a mod that allows you to configure Entity/Player sizes, jump height, health & more!

> It's a patched version of [Thicc Entities](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/thicc-entities) for usage in the [TFC: The Final Frontier](https://modrinth.com/project/tff) total overhaul project.

### Why?
> [Thicc Entities](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/thicc-entities) had a conflict with [Aqua Acrobatics](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aqua-acrobatics) that would result in a game crash on launch. To fix this conflict we removed conflicting ASM code that attempts to modify the player, in a way that is not compatible with [Aqua Acrobatics](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aqua-acrobatics) Mixin patches.

### Note:
- The in-game configuration file editor is broken. It does not save changes to the configuration file. Please modify it manually & re-launch the game to apply changes.

### Downloads
- [CurseForge](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/entifier)
- [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/entifier)
